modules.docstring:
Core module for Modular RAG MCP Server.

This module contains core functionality including configuration management,
logging, and shared utilities.
Query engine components (retrieval stage).

classes.name: DenseRetriever
classes.docstring: Run query embedding + vector search and normalize returned records.

modules.docstring: Dense retriever implementation for semantic recall (D2).

classes.name: Fusion
classes.docstring: Fuse dense and sparse rankings into a single deterministic ranking.

modules.docstring: Result fusion module using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) (D4).

classes.name: HybridSearch
classes.docstring: Orchestrate query processing, parallel retrieval, fusion, and filtering.

modules.docstring: Hybrid retrieval orchestrator for dense/sparse/fusion pipeline (D5 / F3).

classes.name: ProcessedQuery
classes.docstring: Normalized query payload for downstream retrievers.

classes.name: QueryProcessor
classes.docstring: Extract keywords and normalize query filters.

modules.docstring: Query processing utilities for retrieval stage (D1).

classes.name: Reranker
classes.docstring: Apply reranking backend and fallback to fusion order when needed.

modules.docstring: Core reranker orchestrator with graceful fallback (D6 / F3).

classes.name: SparseRetriever
classes.docstring: Query BM25 index and enrich hits with text/metadata from vector store.

modules.docstring: Sparse retriever implementation for BM25-based recall (D3).
Response construction helpers for MCP tool outputs.

classes.name: CitationGenerator
classes.docstring: Create stable structured citations for MCP responses.

modules.docstring: Generate structured citations from retrieval results.

modules.docstring: Assemble MCP multimodal content blocks from retrieval results.

classes.name: ResponseBuilder
classes.docstring: Build MCP content + structured citations.

modules.docstring: Build MCP tool response payloads from retrieval results.

- load_settings() function to read YAML files

modules.docstring: Core domain types shared across ingestion, retrieval, and MCP tools.

Ingestion module for Modular RAG MCP Server.

This module handles document ingestion, processing, and indexing
for the RAG system.

Chunking module for document splitting.

This module provides DocumentChunker, which adapts libs.splitter to the
Ingestion Pipeline by converting Documents to Chunks with proper metadata
inheritance a

classes.docstring:
Adapter that splits Documents into Chunks using configured splitter.

DocumentChunker adds business logic on top of libs.splitter:
1. Generates stable, deterministic chunk IDs
2. Inherits and extends

This module provides DocumentChunker, which serves as an adapter layer between
the low-level libs.splitter and the Ing

Run integrity -> load -> split -> transform -> encode -> store.

Libs module for Modular RAG MCP Server.

This module contains pluggable components for LLM, embedding, and reranking
functionality with factory pattern support for multiple providers.

Tests should pass ``settings.extra['cross_encoder_scorer']`` with a ``predict(pairs)``
method, where ``pairs`` is ``L

modules.docstring: Cross-encoder reranker: scores query–passage pairs and sorts candidates.

Represents a text chunk from document splitting.

Attributes:
    chunk_id: Unique identifier for the chunk
    content: The actual text content of the chunk
    source: Source document path/identifie

classes.name: SplitterSettings
classes.docstring:
Settings for text splitters.

Attributes:
    strategy: Name of the splitting strategy (e.g., 'recursive', 'sentence', 'semantic')
    chunk_size: Target size for chunks (in characters or tokens)

classes.name: BaseSplitter
classes.docstring:
Abstract base class for text splitting strategies.

All splitter implementations must inherit from this class and implement
the split() method according to their specific strategy.

Splits text recursively using character separators.

This implementation provides recursive character splitting with semantic
boundary preservation, similar to LangChain's RecursiveCharacterTextSplitt

MCP Server module for Modular RAG MCP Server.

This module implements the Model Context Protocol server interface
for integration with AI assistants and IDEs.
MCP Server module entry point - enables 'python -m mcp_server' execution.

classes.name: JsonRpcError
classes.docstring: Structured JSON-RPC error that maps to protocol error responses.

classes.name: ToolSpec
classes.docstring: Schema and implementation for one MCP tool.

classes.name: ProtocolHandler
classes.docstring: Handle MCP JSON-RPC methods and capability negotiation.

modules.docstring: JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol handler for MCP server.

MCP server entrypoint using stdio transport.

E1 scope:
- Keep stdout strictly for JSON-RPC messages.
- Route operational logs to stderr.
- Support initialize handshake to prove transport availability
MCP tools exposed by this server.
MCP tool: get document summary by document identifier.
MCP tool: list collections from the vector store.
MCP tool: query_knowledge_hub.

Observability module for Modular RAG MCP Server.

This module provides monitoring, logging, tracing, and dashboard
functionality for the RAG system.

Dashboard module for Modular RAG MCP Server.

Provides a Streamlit-based multi-page observability dashboard
for system overview, data browsing, ingestion management, and trace viewing.

Streamlit multi-page dashboard for Modular RAG MCP Server.

Launch with: streamlit run src/observability/dashboard/app.py
Dashboard page modules.
Data browser page — document list, chunk detail, and image preview.
Evaluation panel page — run evaluation, view metrics, and compare results (H4).
Ingestion manager page — file upload, ingest trigger, progress, and document deletion.
Ingestion trace page — ingestion history list with stage waterfall charts.
System overview page — component configuration and data statistics.
Query trace page — query history, Dense/Sparse comparison, and Rerank changes.
Dashboard service layer — data access and formatting for UI components.

classes.name: ConfigService
classes.docstring: Encapsulates Settings reading and formats component config for display.

modules.docstring: Configuration reading service for the Dashboard UI.

classes.name: DataService
classes.docstring: Encapsulates ChromaStore/ImageStorage reads for the dashboard UI.

modules.docstring: Data access service for Dashboard UI — wraps ChromaStore and ImageStorage reads.

classes.name: TraceService
classes.docstring: Read and parse traces.jsonl into Trace objects for display.

modules.docstring: Trace data service — parse traces.jsonl for the Dashboard UI (G5/G6).

Evaluation module for Modular RAG MCP Server.

Provides Ragas evaluator, composite evaluator, and eval runner
for quantifiable retrieval quality regression testing.

classes.name: CompositeEvaluator
classes.docstring:
Combine multiple evaluators and execute them in parallel.

Usage::

    composite = CompositeEvaluator([ragas_eval, custom_eval])
    metrics = composite.evaluate(payload)
    # metrics == {"ragas_fai

modules.docstring: Composite evaluator — parallel execution of multiple evaluators (H2).

classes.name: EvalReport
classes.docstring: Structured evaluation report.

classes.name: EvalRunner
classes.docstring:
Run golden-test-set based evaluation against the retrieval pipeline.

Does NOT require a running server — it constructs HybridSearch locally
and evaluates retrieval quality directly.

modules.docstring: EvalRunner — reads golden test set, runs retrieval, and computes metrics (H3).

classes.name: RagasEvaluator
classes.docstring:
Evaluator wrapping Ragas framework metrics.

Supports: Faithfulness, Answer Relevancy, Context Precision.

Falls back to a descriptive ImportError if ragas is not installed.

modules.docstring: Ragas-based evaluator with graceful import degradation (H1).

classes.docstring: Custom logging Formatter that outputs JSON Lines.
